work.section-description: A selection of recent projects that showcase our approach to performance, design, and conversion-focused development.

project-1.title: Fervor Games
project-1.description: A mobile-first web presence for an indie game development studio. Built for speed and engagement, the site reflects the brand's energy while delivering a seamless experience across all devices.

project-2.title: Portfolio Website
project-2.description: A clean, conversion-focused portfolio site for a creative professional. Designed to communicate credibility and drive inquiries, with a lighthouse score above 98 and sub-second load times.

process.section-description: See exactly how we work with clients from first contact to a high-performing, conversion-optimized website. This roadmap shows each step so you know what to expect and how we ensure results.

step-1.title: Free Consultation
step-1.description: Talk to one of our experts about your website, goals, and conversion challenges. We’ll show you opportunities for growth before you spend a single dime.

step-2.title: Audit & Analysis
step-2.description: Most redesigns fail to improve conversions. We analyze your site using scientific web design principles, evaluating usability, performance, and conversion potential. Only after we know what works, we make changes.

step-3.title: Design & Development
step-3.description: We create a fast, conversion-optimized website, implementing only changes proven to increase conversions through A/B testing and user behavior analysis.

step-4.title: Launch & Grow
step-4.description: Your site goes live, but the work doesn’t stop. We track results, optimize designs based on data, and continually improve conversions so your website keeps generating revenue.

about.title: We Build Websites That Work
about.description: Fervor Web is a small web agency focused on building high-performance, conversion-optimized websites for small businesses, startups, and creators.

information.title: Where It All Started
information.description: Fervor Web started as a conceptual website for a small boutique web agency specializing in high-performance websites for small businesses for a Web Design Class project in 2026. It still is exactly that. We build customer-centric websites focused on high performance, conversion rate, and SEO, all delivered quickly and maintained affordably through a straightforward subscription model. Too many businesses invest in a website that looks good but fails to convert visitors into customers. Fervor Web combines technical excellence, scientific design principles, and a focus on measurable results. We are a small but dedicated team, and we treat every project as if it were our own business.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: These aren't words on a wall. They're the principles that guide every decision we make.

results.title: Results Are the Only Metric That Matters
results.description: We measure success by one thing: did your business grow? Every decision, every pixel, every line of code is evaluated against that standard.

detail.title: Obsessive Attention to Detail
detail.description: The difference between good and exceptional lives in the details. We sweat the small things because our clients' customers notice them even when they don't.

honesty.title: Honest Advice, Always
honesty.description: We tell clients what they need to hear, not what they want to hear. We treat every client's business as if it were our own.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Is Non-Negotiable
accessibility.description: Great websites work for everyone — regardless of ability, device, or connection speed. We build with inclusion as a baseline, not an afterthought.

partnerships.title: Long-Term Partnerships Over Quick Wins
partnerships.description: We're not interested in one-off projects. We want to be the team you call when your business grows, pivots, or needs to level up.

reputation.title: We Earn Our Reputation With Every Project
reputation.description: Our real product isn't websites — it's the results our clients achieve and the stories they tell about working with us.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: A small team with a big focus on results.

member-1.name: Hristo Hristov
member-1.description: Hristo is a software engineering student at the University of Ruse who's been building games since he was a 8 years old, one of which has racked up over 26 million visits. These days he splits his time between game development and web work, with a focus on conversion rate optimization and performance, building high-performance websites using modern frameworks and methods. His experience combines deep technical skills and strong eye for design.

member-2.name: Ricks
member-2.description: Meet Rix, Fervor Web's resident quality assurance specialist. A competitive programmer of pupil rank on Codeforces, he brings a sharp eye for detail and an unmatched ability to sit still under pressure. When he's not reviewing code, he can be found lying down on the job, which boosts the team's morale and motivation significantly.
